message:
Implement floor division, power, type conversions

Agent 1 - Floor division and power operators:
- Code generation for // using @divFloor()
- Code generation for ** using std.math.pow()
- Augmented assignment support (//=, **=)
- Lexer/parser/AST already existed, only codegen needed

Agent 2 - Type conversion built-ins:
- str() converts int/float/bool to string with proper formatting
- int() parses strings and casts floats/bools
- float() parses strings and casts ints/bools
- Type inference recognizes conversion return types
- Allocator detection for str() (uses ArrayList buffer)

Agent 3 - Output formatting fixes:
- Fixed boolean operator precedence (already done in prev round)
- Identified zip loop type inference issue (not fixed - risky)
- Documented remaining formatting issues for future work

Test results: 42 → 44 passing (+2 tests)
All files under 500 line limit ✅
